_why: The analyzer's technique pass labels every reference frame (media type + editing device). This dictionary maps each observed label to what OUR pipeline can execute today, so the system can name its own gaps (the needs manifest) instead of silently faking a style. Edit statuses as capabilities land: have | partial | building | missing.

real-photo.executor: ref cards + receipt stills (small inserts only)
real-photo.acquire: archival fetcher: Wikimedia Commons / LOC public-domain search into full-frame scene image_file

painting.acquire: archival fetcher; pre-1900 art is public domain and instantly de-AIs the look

map.acquire: archival fetcher (old maps) + Remotion map-pan comp

meme-or-clipart.acquire: sanction only if a study documents it; typeset Remotion comps preferred

live-footage.executor: Wan 2.2 i2v hero clips; t2v direct path

highlight-or-arrow.acquire: Remotion arrow/circle callout comp for any scene

chart-or-diagram.acquire: Remotion chart comp fed by research facts
